sources.geopolitical: GDELT DOC 2.0 API (noticias globales, sin API key)

geopolitical.query: (oil OR brent OR crude OR petroleum) (war OR conflict OR sanctions OR opec OR russia OR iran OR "middle east" OR supply)
sample_titles: Iran Nyt | united states e Israele pronti a riattaccare dalla prossima settimana
Trump says Xi agrees Iran must open strait , China says war shouldnt have started
Merkez Bankası raporu ortaya koydu : İmamoğlu operasyonunun ekonomik faturası ağır oldu
Oil price shock to widen current account deficit , push inflation higher as US - Iran war continues , says economist Santosh Mehrotra

formula: Previsión final = 60% histórico carburantes + 25% Brent + 10% EUR/USD + 5% riesgo geopolítico.
warning: Estimación orientativa. No es una recomendación financiera ni garantiza precios futuros.
